Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Man, something just feels off... Like I'm in some kinda funk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}But, c'mon... It's not like this is that much different from before, so what's up with me all of a sudden?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2037 0 0}Nah, no frickin' way! Quit thinkin' like that, Junpei![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}What's gotten you so distressed, Iori?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2084 0 0}"Distressed"? Who's distressed? Definitely not me, hahaha...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Was I mistaken? It certainly seemed like it to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}Our weakened Persona abilities have made for some difficult battles, haven't they?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}I can understand your anxiety.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}But you're not the only one dealing with this. We are all experiencing the same struggle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}This really isn't my strong suit—comforting people, I mean. It requires a certain intuition.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 6 25 25}It appears that making Aigis the leader was the right call.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 52 -1 0 0}Is it that surprising? It's only natural to seek assistance to cover one's weaknesses.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}Huh... You've got a point. Now that I think about it, of course you'd say that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2092 0 0}I should have known this already... Why'd I lose sight of it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}All that stuff about you, Senpai... and about myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2088 0 0}Heh, don't you worry about me! It's okay to be a loser, because nobody's perfect, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}I'm afraid I don't follow... But if that's what makes you feel better, then that's all that matters.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}Honestly, I'm relieved. It's been quite a while since I've last seen that carefree smile of yours.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}Your smile reminded me of something as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}Or rather, someone I want to protect—not for my family's sake, but for my own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 7 52 -1 0 0}What, you mean like... a lover!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4075 0 0}Do you think this is funny, Iori? Tread lightly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}Anyway, I kinda get you, I think.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 11 52 -1 0 0}The times we're all together, well... Those are the memories I treasure most.[n]{f 1 1}
